steps.title: Decompose the function into components
steps.content:
The function $W(x) = 2x + 60$ represents the sum of two time components:
  • $2x$ — time to water $x$ plants at 2 minutes per plant
  • 60 — a fixed time that does not depend on $x$

steps.title: Identify the fixed time as mowing time
steps.content:
The 60-minute component must be the mowing time because it is constant regardless of the number of plants to water. Algebraically, when $x = 0$:
$$W(0) = 2(0) + 60 = 60$$The gardener takes 60 minutes to mow the grass.
